topic_title: Data types — string, integer, float, boolean

positional_bias.detail: Correct answer at position 0 twice, position 2 twice, positions 1 and 3 once each. Max share 0.333 — below the 0.40 threshold.

length_bias.detail: No question has the correct answer as the longest option. All ratios below 1.20 threshold. Q4 (1.15) and Q6 (1.18) are closest but both within range.

distractor_plausibility.detail: All distractors capture plausible beginner misconceptions: Q1 (spacing/quote/colon confusion), Q2 (case/length/whole-string confusion), Q3 (regular division vs floor div vs modulo), Q4 (auto-rounding, silent correction, TypeError), Q5 (logical error, None, TypeError), Q6 (missing str(), type name vs function, float() vs str()).

objective_coverage.detail: All 6 Learning Objectives tested. One question per LO.

scope.detail: No comparison operators tested (not in scope until 11.5). No if/else, no lists, no user input. All distractors are beginner misconceptions about this topic's concepts only.

verdict: PASS (cycle 1). All checks green. 6 MCQ, max_share=0.333, no length bias, all 6 LOs covered, no out-of-scope questions. Distractors are plausible beginner misconceptions throughout.
